activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception active - only origin verified

consignor.motivation: LC exception is active. According to the LC exception rules, consignor verification is not applicable.

consignee.motivation: LC exception is active. Consignee verification is not applicable under LC rules.

goods_description.motivation: Goods description verification is not applicable because LC exception is active.

quantity.motivation: Quantity verification is excluded due to LC exception.

origin.motivation: Under LC exception (2.2), only origin verification applies. The certificate indicates origin as 'Belgium', which is explicitly stated in the invoice as 'Country of Origin: Belgium' and thus matches after normalizations (4.5.1, 4.5.5).

manual_review_triggers: 2.2 LC exception active: only origin verification applicable
overall_assessment.decision_summary: Letter of Credit exception applies, restricting verification to origin only. Origin matches but other control points are not applicable, leading to manual review recommendation.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet hänvisar till ett Letter of Credit, varför endast ursprungslandet har verifierats. Ursprungslandet Belgien bekräftas i fakturan, men övriga uppgifter kräver manuell granskning enligt regelverket.
